Asset files in this folder are released under the terms of a Royalty Free license: 
Upon purchasing the addon, you are granted a non-exclusive, perpetual license to use the included asset files (images, icons, blend files...) as part of the addon. The purchase requires a one-time payment only; no additional royalties or recurring fees are required for continued use.
The asset files may only be used as part of the addon and may not be extracted for use in other projects.
They may not be redistributed, resold, sublicensed, or made available as standalone files, whether modified or unmodified.
